word: G1554 - ἐκδίδωμι - ekdídōmi - ek-did-o'-mee - Let forth

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to give out of one's house, power, hand, stores; to give out, give up, give over
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1537 and G1325; to give forth, that is, (specifically) to lease: - let forth (out).
